properties.Focus & Notes: Series A: $58.5M (2022) | Total raised: $140M+ | 51-200 employees | Backed by Accenture, Bell, Magna | Building general-purpose robots with human-like intelligence
properties.Short Blurb: Robotics company developing general-purpose AI and humanoid robots. Founded in 2018, raised $140M+ with backing from Accenture, Bell, and Magna.

properties.Focus & Notes: Public company (TSX-V: MVAI) | Market cap ~$10M CAD | AI-powered knowledge engineering for mining and climate risk
properties.Short Blurb: AI knowledge engineering company for mining and climate risk assessment. Public company trading on TSX-V (MVAI).

properties.Focus & Notes: Series D: $394M (2021) | Total raised: $476M+ | Valuation: $1.75B (Unicorn) | 501-1000 employees | Backed by TCV, Goldman Sachs
properties.Short Blurb: Global identity verification unicorn valued at $1.75B. Founded in 2011, raised $476M+ including $394M Series D from TCV and Goldman Sachs.

properties.Focus & Notes: Public company (NYSE: QBTS) | Market cap ~$400M USD | 201-500 employees | Leader in quantum computing systems
properties.Short Blurb: Quantum computing pioneer founded in 1999. Public company (NYSE: QBTS) with 200+ employees, leading in quantum annealing systems.

properties.Focus & Notes: Total raised: $45M+ | 51-200 employees | Backed by Accenture, Allianz | Quantum software for optimization and drug discovery
properties.Short Blurb: Quantum computing software company founded in 2012. Raised $45M+ from Accenture and Allianz, focusing on quantum algorithms for optimization.

properties.Focus & Notes: Series B: $62M (2022) | Total raised: $62M+ | 51-200 employees | AI-powered competitive intelligence platform
properties.Short Blurb: AI-powered competitive intelligence platform founded in 2015. Raised $62M Series B in 2022, helping teams track and analyze competitors.

properties.Focus & Notes: Series F: $900M (2024) | Valuation: $3B (Unicorn) | 1000+ employees | Cloud-based legal practice management
properties.Short Blurb: Legal tech unicorn valued at $3B. Founded in 2008, raised $900M Series F in 2024, serving 150,000+ legal professionals globally.

properties.Focus & Notes: Public company (TSX: THNC) | IPO 2021 | Market cap ~$150M CAD | 201-500 employees | Online course platform
properties.Short Blurb: EdTech platform for online course creation. Founded in 2012, went public on TSX in 2021, serving 50,000+ course creators.

properties.Focus & Notes: Series B: $30M (2023) | Total raised: $130M+ | 201-500 employees | AI-powered background screening
properties.Short Blurb: AI-powered background screening platform founded in 2016. Raised $130M+ including $30M Series B in 2023, based in Victoria.
